article_title: Bylaw 14745 — Housing Agreement (6263 abd 6337 Cassie Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In Affordable Rental Rules for 6263–6337 Cassie Avenue Development
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14745, authorizing a legally binding housing agreement with Willingdon Avenue Investments Ltd. that locks a portion of the new 38-storey building at Cassie Avenue into non-market (below-market-rate) rental housing permanently.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property near this site, review tenant assistance and eligibility rules that may affect your tenants.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
